analysis.root_cause: The agent failed to perform the horizontal flip transformation required to read the mirrored clock face correctly before calculating the time.
The agent failed to account for the 180-degree rotation of the clock face in addition to the horizontal mirror reflection.
The agent fails to correctly read the time from the transformed image (Artifact 1 shows 7:10, but the agent misinterprets it).
The tool only performed a horizontal flip, failing to account for the vertical inversion (upside-down state) of the clock face.
